PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-28-2016 Continued To Oct-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Yun Xiao Yu and the Attorney Faye Lee to appear on October 26, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they have not responded to the examiner's notes. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not Reported)
